title: Docker Buildx CI, Tests, Context, Cache, and Multi-Platform Output · Delivery-System Defense
summary: A release board compares near-miss decisions for docker buildx ci, tests, context, cache, and multi-platform output and requires the learner to defend the smallest safe container build and test workflow. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for container build and test workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Configure official Docker setup and build actions with explicit Git or path context, Dockerfile, target, platforms, inputs, and output mode.
Use secret mounts, scoped cache backends, deterministic keys, trusted writers, and no credential-bearing ARG, layer, log, or attestation.
Test image configuration, non-root and read-only behavior, health, signals, resources, network, changed config, and failure before registry mutation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Ci Build Record Summary Debug
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Buildx workflow leaks a secret through ARG, trusts a fork cache, builds only amd64, pushes before tests, and cannot tie output to source. Separate builder, context, platforms, cache, test, secret, and digest evidence. Competency probe: Retain build record, summary, stages, timings, cache use, inputs, warnings, digest, and controlled reproduction instructions without secrets.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?

Evidence target: Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Ci Build Record Summary Debug.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for retain build record, summary, stages, timings, cache use, inputs, warnings, digest, and controlled reproduction instructions without secrets. For Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Ci Build Record Summary Debug, keep Ci Build Record Summary Debug connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.text: A quiz Buildx workflow leaks a secret through ARG, trusts a fork cache, builds only amd64, pushes before tests, and cannot tie output to source. Separate builder, context, platforms, cache, test, secret, and digest evidence. Competency probe: Retain build record, summary, stages, timings, cache use, inputs, warnings, digest, and controlled reproduction instructions without secrets.

content.title: Fault-isolation decision
content.text: Select evidence that identifies a cause, not a patch that only hides the Ci Build Record Summary Debug symptom.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: Docker Build GitHub Actions and Attestations — Controls Buildx setup, contexts, caching, outputs, summaries, registry identity, SBOM, provenance, and secret handling.

At Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Ci Build Record Summary Debug, trace this concrete input and predict evaluation, shell, job graph, cache, artifact, trust, deployment, signal, rollback, and cleanup evidence before reviewing it: A quiz Buildx workflow leaks a secret through ARG, trusts a fork cache, builds only amd64, pushes before tests, and cannot tie output to source. Separate builder, context, platforms, cache, test, secret, and digest evidence. Competency probe: Retain build record, summary, stages, timings, cache use, inputs, warnings, digest, and controlled reproduction instructions without secrets.

For Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Ci Build Record Summary Debug, challenge the documented misconception with workflow, run, artifact, policy, fault, repair, rollback, and transfer evidence: A smaller final image proves the build pipeline became faster.

stimulus.title: Ci Build Record Summary Debug failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: A smaller final image proves the build pipeline became faster.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Retain build record, summary, stages, timings, cache use, inputs, warnings, digest, and controlled reproduction instructions without secrets.

options.text: Accept the result because visible output is the highest authority. That claim does not survive the diagnose the hidden failure evidence boundary.

For diagnose the hidden failure, copy one familiar workflow, omit event and revision identity, permissions, runner, immutable artifact, failure, rollback, and disposable delivery-environment transfer checks, then accept a green run as production proof.
Run the boundary case, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.
